passage_title: Striking Back at Lightning With Lasers

sentences.sentence: Seldom is the weather more dramatic than when thunderstorms strike.
sentences.translation: 很少有天气比雷暴来袭时更加惊心动魄。

structure.text: Seldom
is the weather more dramatic than when thunderstorms strike
when thunderstorms strike

difficult_points: Seldom 置于句首引起部分倒装，is 提前。
than when... 构成比较结构。

sentences.sentence: Their electrical fury inflicts death or serious injury on around 500 people each year in the United States alone.
sentences.translation: 仅在美国，雷暴的电击每年就会使大约500人死亡或严重受伤。

structure.text: Their electrical fury
inflicts death or serious injury on around 500 people
each year in the United States alone

difficult_points: inflict A on B 表示‘使B遭受A’。
death or serious injury 是并列宾语。

sentences.sentence: As the clouds roll in, a leisurely round of golf can become a terrifying dice with death - out in the open, a lone golfer may be a lightning bolt's most inviting target.
sentences.translation: 当乌云滚滚而来时，一场悠闲的高尔夫球可能变成与死神的可怕赌博——在空旷处，孤身的高尔夫球手可能成为闪电最诱人的目标。

structure.text: As the clouds roll in
a leisurely round of golf can become a terrifying dice with death
out in the open
a lone golfer may be a lightning bolt's most inviting target

difficult_points: As 引导时间从句，roll in 表示云层涌来。
破折号后补充说明空旷环境下高尔夫球手的危险。

sentences.sentence: And there is damage to property too.
sentences.translation: 财产也会遭到损害。

structure.text: there is damage to property
too

difficult_points: there is 结构表示‘存在财产损失’。
too 表示除人员伤亡外，财产也受影响。

sentences.sentence: Lightning damage costs American power companies more than $100 million a year.
sentences.translation: 雷电造成的损失使美国电力公司每年付出超过1亿美元。

structure.text: Lightning damage
costs American power companies more than $100 million a year

difficult_points: cost sb money 表示‘使某人花费金钱’。
more than $100 million 是金额宾语。

sentences.sentence: But researchers in the United States and Japan are planning to hit back.
sentences.translation: 但美国和日本的研究人员正计划进行反击。

structure.text: researchers in the United States and Japan
are planning to hit back

difficult_points: are planning to 是现在进行时，表示近期计划。
hit back 是比喻表达，意为反击。

sentences.sentence: Already in laboratory trials they have tested strategies for neutralising the power of thunderstorms, and this winter they will brave real storms, equipped with an armoury of lasers that they will be pointing towards the heavens to discharge thunderclouds before lightning can strike.
sentences.translation: 他们已经在实验室试验中测试了削弱雷暴威力的策略；今年冬天，他们将装备一整套激光器，勇敢面对真正的风暴，并在闪电击中之前把雷云放电。

structure.text: Already in laboratory trials
they have tested strategies for neutralising the power of thunderstorms
and this winter they will brave real storms
equipped with an armoury of lasers
that they will be pointing towards the heavens to discharge thunderclouds before lightning can strike
before lightning can strike

difficult_points: equipped with... 是过去分词短语，补充说明 they。
that 修饰 lasers；before 从句说明放电必须早于闪电袭击。

sentences.sentence: The idea of forcing storm clouds to discharge their lightning on command is not new.
sentences.translation: 让暴风云按指令释放闪电的想法并不新鲜。

structure.text: The idea of forcing storm clouds to discharge their lightning on command
forcing storm clouds to discharge their lightning on command
is not new

difficult_points: forcing... 是 idea 的动名词补充内容。
on command 表示‘按照指令’。

sentences.sentence: In the early 1960s, researchers tried firing rockets trailing wires into thunderclouds to set up an easy discharge path for the huge electric charges that these clouds generate.
sentences.translation: 20世纪60年代初，研究人员尝试把拖着导线的火箭发射进雷云，为这些云层产生的巨大电荷建立一条容易放电的路径。

structure.text: In the early 1960s
researchers tried firing rockets trailing wires into thunderclouds
trailing wires
to set up an easy discharge path for the huge electric charges that these clouds generate
that these clouds generate

difficult_points: try doing 表示尝试做某事；trailing wires 修饰 rockets。
that these clouds generate 修饰 electric charges。

sentences.sentence: The technique survives to this day at a test site in Florida run by the University of Florida, with support from the Electrical Power Research Institute (EPRI), based in California.
sentences.translation: 这项技术至今仍在佛罗里达一个由佛罗里达大学运营的试验场使用，并得到位于加州的电力研究所支持。

structure.text: The technique survives to this day at a test site in Florida
run by the University of Florida
with support from the Electrical Power Research Institute (EPRI)
based in California

difficult_points: run by 修饰 test site；based in California 修饰 EPRI。
with support from 表示得到某机构支持。

sentences.sentence: EPRI, which is funded by power companies, is looking at ways to protect the United States' power grid from lightning strikes.
sentences.translation: 由电力公司资助的EPRI正在研究保护美国电网免受雷击的方法。

structure.text: EPRI
which is funded by power companies
is looking at ways to protect the United States' power grid from lightning strikes
to protect the United States' power grid from lightning strikes

difficult_points: which 引导非限制性定语从句，补充说明 EPRI 的资金来源。
protect A from B 表示保护A免受B。

sentences.sentence: 'We can cause the lightning to strike where we want it to using rockets,' says Ralph Bernstein, manager of lightning projects at EPRI.
sentences.translation: EPRI雷电项目经理拉尔夫·伯恩斯坦说：‘我们可以利用火箭让闪电击中我们希望它击中的地方。’

structure.text: We can cause the lightning to strike where we want it to using rockets
where we want it to
using rockets
says Ralph Bernstein, manager of lightning projects at EPRI

difficult_points: cause sb/sth to do 表示‘使……做某事’。
where we want it to 中 it to 省略 strike，避免重复。

sentences.sentence: The rocket site is providing precise measurements of lightning voltages and allowing engineers to check how electrical equipment bears up.
sentences.translation: 火箭试验场正在提供精确的雷电电压测量结果，并让工程师检查电气设备的承受能力。

structure.text: The rocket site
is providing precise measurements of lightning voltages and allowing engineers to check how electrical equipment bears up
how electrical equipment bears up

difficult_points: is providing 和 allowing 是并列现在分词谓语。
how 从句作 check 的宾语，bear up 表示承受得住。

sentences.sentence: Bad behaviour
sentences.translation: 糟糕的表现

structure.text: Bad behaviour

difficult_points: 这是段落标题，不是完整句子。
behaviour 指火箭触发闪电时的失控表现。

sentences.sentence: But while rockets are fine for research, they cannot provide the protection from lightning strikes that everyone is looking for.
sentences.translation: 但尽管火箭适合研究，它们无法提供所有人都在寻求的雷击防护。

structure.text: while rockets are fine for research
they cannot provide the protection from lightning strikes that everyone is looking for
that everyone is looking for

difficult_points: while 在此表示让步；that 修饰 protection。
look for 的介词不能省略，that 是其宾语。

sentences.sentence: The rockets cost around $1,200 each, can only be fired at a limited frequency and their failure rate is about 40 per cent.
sentences.translation: 火箭每枚约1200美元，只能以有限频率发射，而且失败率约为40%。

structure.text: The rockets cost around $1,200 each
can only be fired at a limited frequency
their failure rate is about 40 per cent

difficult_points: 三个并列分句列出火箭的缺点。
can be fired 是被动语态，at a limited frequency 表示发射频率有限。

sentences.sentence: And even when they do trigger lightning, things still do not always go according to plan.
sentences.translation: 即使火箭确实触发了闪电，事情也并不总是按计划进行。

structure.text: even when they do trigger lightning
things still do not always go according to plan

difficult_points: do trigger 中 do 用于强调‘确实触发’。
go according to plan 表示按计划进行。

sentences.sentence: 'Lightning is not perfectly well behaved,' says Bernstein.
sentences.translation: 伯恩斯坦说：‘闪电并不是完全循规蹈矩的。’

structure.text: Lightning is not perfectly well behaved
says Bernstein

difficult_points: well behaved 在此拟人化形容闪电是否按预期运行。
perfectly 修饰 well behaved，表示程度。

sentences.sentence: 'Occasionally, it will take a branch and go someplace it wasn't supposed to go.'
sentences.translation: ‘有时，它会岔开去，跑到本不该去的地方。’

structure.text: Occasionally
it will take a branch and go someplace it wasn't supposed to go
it wasn't supposed to go

difficult_points: take a branch 是比喻说法，指闪电改变路径。
be supposed to 表示‘本应当’。

sentences.sentence: And anyway, who would want to fire streams of rockets in a populated area?
sentences.translation: 再说，谁会愿意在有人居住的地区发射一连串火箭呢？

structure.text: And anyway
who would want to fire streams of rockets in a populated area

difficult_points: would want to 表示假设性意愿。
streams of rockets 指连续发射的大量火箭。

sentences.sentence: 'What goes up must come down,' points out Jean-Claude Diels of the University of New Mexico.
sentences.translation: 新墨西哥大学的让-克洛德·迪尔斯指出：‘升上去的东西必然会落下来。’

structure.text: What goes up
must come down
points out Jean-Claude Diels of the University of New Mexico

difficult_points: What goes up 是主语从句，意为‘升上去的东西’。
must 表示必然性。

sentences.sentence: Diels is leading a project, which is backed by EPRI, to try to use lasers to discharge lightning safely - and safety is a basic requirement since no one wants to put themselves or their expensive equipment at risk.
sentences.translation: 迪尔斯正在领导一个由EPRI支持的项目，尝试用激光安全地释放闪电——安全是基本要求，因为没人想让自己或昂贵设备处于危险中。

structure.text: Diels is leading a project
which is backed by EPRI
to try to use lasers to discharge lightning safely
and safety is a basic requirement since no one wants to put themselves or their expensive equipment at risk
since no one wants to put themselves or their expensive equipment at risk

difficult_points: which 修饰 project；to try... 是项目目的。
put someone at risk 表示使某人处于危险中。

sentences.sentence: With around $500,000 invested so far, a promising system is just emerging from the laboratory.
sentences.translation: 到目前为止已投入约50万美元，一个有希望的系统正从实验室中诞生。

structure.text: With around $500,000 invested so far
a promising system is just emerging from the laboratory

difficult_points: With 独立主格结构说明已投入的资金背景。
emerge from 表示从实验阶段逐渐出现。

sentences.sentence: The idea began some 20 years ago, when high-powered lasers were revealing their ability to extract electrons out of atoms and create ions.
sentences.translation: 这个想法始于约20年前，当时高功率激光正展现出从原子中提取电子并生成离子的能力。

structure.text: The idea began some 20 years ago
when high-powered lasers were revealing their ability to extract electrons out of atoms and create ions
to extract electrons out of atoms and create ions

difficult_points: when 引导时间从句；were revealing 表示当时持续展现。
ability 后接并列不定式。

sentences.sentence: If a laser could generate a line of ionisation in the air all the way up to a storm cloud, this conducting path could be used to guide lightning to Earth, before the electric field becomes strong enough to break down the air in an uncontrollable surge.
sentences.translation: 如果激光能在空气中一直生成延伸到暴风云的电离线，这条导电路径就能在电场强到以不可控激增击穿空气之前，把闪电引向地面。

structure.text: If a laser could generate a line of ionisation in the air all the way up to a storm cloud
this conducting path could be used to guide lightning to Earth
before the electric field becomes strong enough to break down the air in an uncontrollable surge
to break down the air in an uncontrollable surge

difficult_points: If 从句用 could 表示假设条件。
strong enough to... 表示足够强以至于击穿空气。

sentences.sentence: To stop the laser itself being struck, it would not be pointed straight at the clouds.
sentences.translation: 为了防止激光器本身被击中，它不会直接对准云层。

structure.text: To stop the laser itself being struck
it would not be pointed straight at the clouds

difficult_points: stop...being struck 中 being struck 是动名词被动结构。
would not be pointed 是假设条件下的被动语态。

sentences.sentence: Instead it would be directed at a mirror, and from there into the sky.
sentences.translation: 相反，它会被对准一面镜子，再从镜子射向天空。

structure.text: Instead
it would be directed at a mirror
and from there into the sky

difficult_points: would be directed 是假设语气的被动结构。
from there 指从镜子处。

sentences.sentence: The mirror would be protected by placing lightning conductors close by.
sentences.translation: 通过在附近放置避雷导体来保护镜子。

structure.text: The mirror
would be protected
by placing lightning conductors close by

difficult_points: by placing 表示保护镜子的方式。
would be protected 是假设被动语态。

sentences.sentence: Ideally, the cloud-zapper (gun) would be cheap enough to be installed around all key power installations, and portable enough to be taken to international sporting events to beam up at brewing storm clouds.
sentences.translation: 理想情况下，这种‘云层放电枪’应便宜到能安装在所有关键电力设施周围，也应便携到能带往国际体育赛事，向正在形成的暴风云发射激光。

structure.text: Ideally
the cloud-zapper (gun) would be cheap enough to be installed around all key power installations
and portable enough to be taken to international sporting events to beam up at brewing storm clouds
to beam up at brewing storm clouds

difficult_points: 两个 enough to 结构分别说明设备应具备的价格和便携性。
brewing 修饰 storm clouds，表示正在形成。

sentences.sentence: A stumbling block
sentences.translation: 一个障碍

structure.text: A stumbling block

difficult_points: 这是段落标题，不是完整句子。
stumbling block 是‘绊脚石、障碍’的比喻表达。

sentences.sentence: However, there is still a big stumbling block.
sentences.translation: 然而，仍然存在一个很大的障碍。

structure.text: However
there is still a big stumbling block

difficult_points: there is 结构引出存在的障碍。
still 表示障碍目前仍未解决。

sentences.sentence: The laser is no nifty portable: it's a monster that takes up a whole room.
sentences.translation: 这种激光器一点也不小巧便携：它是一个占据整间房的大块头。

structure.text: The laser is no nifty portable
it's a monster that takes up a whole room
that takes up a whole room

difficult_points: no nifty portable 是名词短语，意为‘并非小巧便携设备’。
that 修饰 monster；take up 表示占据空间。

sentences.sentence: Diels is trying to cut down the size and says that a laser around the size of a small table is in the offing.
sentences.translation: 迪尔斯正努力缩小设备尺寸，并说一台大约小桌子大小的激光器即将问世。

structure.text: Diels is trying to cut down the size
and says that a laser around the size of a small table is in the offing
around the size of a small table

difficult_points: cut down the size 表示缩小尺寸。
in the offing 表示即将发生或出现。

sentences.sentence: He plans to test this more manageable system on live thunderclouds next summer.
sentences.translation: 他计划明年夏天在真实雷云上测试这个更易操作的系统。

structure.text: He
plans to test
this more manageable system
on live thunderclouds next summer

difficult_points: plans to test 是 plan 后接不定式。
live thunderclouds 指真实存在、正在发展的雷云。

sentences.sentence: Bernstein says that Diels's system is attracting lots of interest from the power companies.
sentences.translation: 伯恩斯坦说，迪尔斯的系统正吸引电力公司的大量兴趣。

structure.text: Bernstein says
that Diels's system is attracting lots of interest from the power companies

difficult_points: that 引导 says 的宾语从句。
attract interest from 表示吸引某方兴趣。

sentences.sentence: But they have not yet come up with the $5 million that EPRI says will be needed to develop a commercial system, by making the lasers yet smaller and cheaper.
sentences.translation: 但他们还没有筹集到EPRI认为开发商业系统所需的500万美元，这笔资金将用于把激光器做得更小更便宜。

structure.text: they have not yet come up with the $5 million
that EPRI says will be needed to develop a commercial system
by making the lasers yet smaller and cheaper

difficult_points: that 从句修饰 $5 million，says 后省略了关系代词作主语。
come up with 表示筹集或提出；by making 表示实现方式。

sentences.sentence: 'I cannot say I have money yet, but I'm working on it,' says Bernstein.
sentences.translation: 伯恩斯坦说：‘我不能说现在已经有钱了，但我正在努力筹措。’

structure.text: I cannot say I have money yet, but I'm working on it
I have money yet
says Bernstein

difficult_points: say 后省略 that，引导宾语从句 I have money。
work on it 指继续努力解决筹资问题。

sentences.sentence: He reckons that the forthcoming field tests will be the turning point - and he's hoping for good news.
sentences.translation: 他认为即将开展的实地测试将成为转折点——他也希望听到好消息。

structure.text: He reckons
that the forthcoming field tests will be the turning point
and he's hoping for good news

difficult_points: reckon that 表示认为，that 引导宾语从句。
turning point 是关键转折点的比喻表达。

sentences.sentence: Bernstein predicts 'an avalanche of interest and support' if all goes well.
sentences.translation: 伯恩斯坦预测，如果一切顺利，将会获得‘兴趣和支持的雪崩’。

structure.text: Bernstein predicts 'an avalanche of interest and support'
if all goes well

difficult_points: if all goes well 是条件从句。
avalanche of interest 是夸张比喻，表示大量涌来的关注。

sentences.sentence: He expects to see cloud-zappers eventually costing $50,000 to $100,000 each.
sentences.translation: 他预计最终每台云层放电枪的成本会在5万至10万美元之间。

structure.text: He expects to see
cloud-zappers eventually costing $50,000 to $100,000 each

difficult_points: expect to see 后接宾语和现在分词，表示预计看到的状态。
costing 修饰 cloud-zappers。

sentences.sentence: Other scientists could also benefit.
sentences.translation: 其他科学家也可能从中受益。

structure.text: Other scientists
could also benefit

difficult_points: could 表示可能性。
benefit 在此是不及物动词，表示受益。

sentences.sentence: With a lightning 'switch' at their fingertips, materials scientists could find out what happens when mighty currents meet matter.
sentences.translation: 有了触手可及的闪电‘开关’，材料科学家就能研究强大电流遇到物质时会发生什么。

structure.text: With a lightning 'switch' at their fingertips
materials scientists could find out
what happens when mighty currents meet matter
when mighty currents meet matter

difficult_points: With 独立介词短语说明拥有该技术的条件。
what happens 是 find out 的宾语从句，when 从句嵌在其中。

sentences.sentence: Diels also hopes to see the birth of 'interactive meteorology' - not just forecasting the weather but controlling it. 'If we could discharge clouds, we might affect the weather,' he says.
sentences.translation: 迪尔斯还希望看到‘互动气象学’诞生——不仅预测天气，还能控制天气。他说：‘如果我们能让云层放电，也许就能影响天气。’

structure.text: Diels also hopes to see the birth of 'interactive meteorology'
not just forecasting the weather but controlling it
If we could discharge clouds, we might affect the weather
he says

difficult_points: not just...but... 表示‘不仅……而且……’，此处 but 后省略 also。
If we could...might... 是假设条件句，表示可能的影响。

sentences.sentence: And perhaps, says Diels, we'll be able to confront some other meteorological menaces.
sentences.translation: 迪尔斯说，也许我们还能应对其他气象威胁。

structure.text: And perhaps
we'll be able to confront some other meteorological menaces
says Diels

difficult_points: be able to 表示能力或可能性。
says Diels 是插入的报告语。

sentences.sentence: 'We think we could prevent hail by inducing lightning,' he says.
sentences.translation: 他说：‘我们认为可以通过诱发闪电来阻止冰雹。’

structure.text: We think
we could prevent hail by inducing lightning
by inducing lightning
he says

difficult_points: think 后接省略 that 的宾语从句。
by inducing 表示阻止冰雹的方法。

sentences.sentence: Thunder, the shock wave that comes from a lightning flash, is thought to be the trigger for the torrential rain that is typical of storms.
sentences.translation: 雷声——闪电产生的冲击波——被认为是暴风雨典型倾盆大雨的诱因。

structure.text: Thunder
the shock wave that comes from a lightning flash
that comes from a lightning flash
is thought to be the trigger for the torrential rain that is typical of storms
that is typical of storms

difficult_points: 两个 that 从句分别修饰 shock wave 和 torrential rain。
is thought to be 是‘被认为是’的被动结构。

sentences.sentence: A laser thunder factory could shake the moisture out of clouds, perhaps preventing the formation of the giant hailstones that threaten crops.
sentences.translation: 激光雷声工厂可以把水分从云中震出，从而可能阻止威胁农作物的巨大冰雹形成。

structure.text: A laser thunder factory
could shake the moisture out of clouds
perhaps preventing the formation of the giant hailstones that threaten crops
that threaten crops

difficult_points: preventing 分词短语表示前句动作可能带来的结果。
that threaten crops 修饰 giant hailstones。

sentences.sentence: With luck, as the storm clouds gather this winter, laser-toting researchers could, for the first time, strike back.
sentences.translation: 如果幸运的话，今年冬天当暴风云聚集时，携带激光设备的研究人员或许能首次进行反击。

structure.text: With luck
as the storm clouds gather this winter
laser-toting researchers could, for the first time, strike back

difficult_points: With luck 表示‘如果幸运的话’。
laser-toting 是复合形容词，修饰 researchers；could 表示可能。
